hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why wiring to China through your bank quietly costs you $12,000 a year.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result)
hooks.text: Here's exactly how much one 2% wire gap costs over a year of sourcing.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked twelve supplier wires and noticed something disturbing.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: Smart business owners pay the same China suppliers without the 2% rate skim.

hooks.template: This is (insert large number) of (insert item).
hooks.text: This is $12,000 a year, hidden inside a rate you never check.
